scripts.dev: mkdir -p logs && source .env && vite dev --port $PORT --force 2>&1 | tee logs/server.log
scripts.test:integration: pnpm build && pnpm vitest --config test/integration/vitest.config.ts run
scripts.clean: pnpm clean:node && pnpm clean:wrangler && pnpm clean:etc
scripts.d1:migrate:list:PRODUCTION: wrangler d1 migrations list tces-d1-production --env production --remote
scripts.d1:migrate:apply:PRODUCTION: wrangler d1 migrations apply tces-d1-production --env production --remote
scripts.refs:shadcn: rm -rf refs/shadcn && mkdir -p refs/shadcn && curl -L https://github.com/shadcn-ui/ui/archive/refs/tags/shadcn@3.8.5.tar.gz | tar -xz -C refs/shadcn --strip-components=1
scripts.refs:tan-form: rm -rf refs/tan-form && mkdir -p refs/tan-form && curl -L https://github.com/TanStack/form/archive/refs/tags/@tanstack/react-form@1.28.3.tar.gz | tar -xz -C refs/tan-form --strip-components=1
scripts.refs:base-ui: rm -rf refs/base-ui && mkdir -p refs/base-ui && curl -L https://github.com/mui/base-ui/archive/refs/tags/v1.2.0.tar.gz | tar -xz -C refs/base-ui --strip-components=1
scripts.refs:agents: rm -rf refs/agents && mkdir -p refs/agents && curl -L https://github.com/cloudflare/agents/archive/refs/tags/agents@0.6.0.tar.gz | tar -xz -C refs/agents --strip-components=1
scripts.refs:agents-starter: rm -rf refs/agents-starter && mkdir -p refs/agents-starter && curl -L https://github.com/cloudflare/agents-starter/archive/refs/heads/main.tar.gz | tar -xz -C refs/agents-starter --strip-components=1
scripts.refs:ai-elements: rm -rf refs/ai-elements && mkdir -p refs/ai-elements && curl -L https://github.com/vercel/ai-elements/archive/refs/tags/ai-elements@1.8.0.tar.gz | tar -xz -C refs/ai-elements --strip-components=1
scripts.refs:tan-router: rm -rf refs/tan-router && mkdir -p refs/tan-router && curl -L https://github.com/TanStack/router/archive/refs/tags/v1.163.3.tar.gz | tar -xz -C refs/tan-router --strip-components=1
scripts.refs:tan-query: rm -rf refs/tan-query && mkdir -p refs/tan-query && curl -sL https://github.com/TanStack/query/archive/refs/tags/@tanstack/react-query@5.90.21.tar.gz | tar -xzC refs/tan-query --strip-components=1
scripts.refs:tan-start: rm -rf refs/tan-start && mkdir -p refs/tan-start && curl -L https://github.com/TanStack/router/archive/refs/tags/v1.166.1.tar.gz | tar -xz -C refs/tan-start --strip-components=1
scripts.refs:better-auth: rm -rf refs/better-auth && mkdir -p refs/better-auth && curl -L https://github.com/better-auth/better-auth/archive/refs/tags/v1.5.1.tar.gz | tar -xz -C refs/better-auth --strip-components=1
scripts.refs:cloudflare-docs: rm -rf refs/cloudflare-docs && mkdir -p refs/cloudflare-docs && curl -L https://github.com/cloudflare/cloudflare-docs/archive/refs/heads/production.tar.gz | tar -xz -C refs/cloudflare-docs --strip-components=1
scripts.refs:cloudflare-templates: rm -rf refs/cloudflare-templates && mkdir -p refs/cloudflare-templates && curl -L https://github.com/cloudflare/templates/archive/refs/tags/v8.0.0.tar.gz | tar -xz -C refs/cloudflare-templates --strip-components=1
scripts.refs:ai: rm -rf refs/ai && mkdir -p refs/ai && curl -L https://github.com/vercel/ai/archive/refs/tags/ai@6.0.49.tar.gz | tar -xz -C refs/ai --strip-components=1
scripts.refs:aws4fetch: rm -rf refs/aws4fetch && mkdir -p refs/aws4fetch && curl -L https://github.com/mhart/aws4fetch/archive/refs/tags/v1.0.20.tar.gz | tar -xz -C refs/aws4fetch --strip-components=1
scripts.refs:effect4: rm -rf refs/effect4 && mkdir -p refs/effect4 && curl -L https://github.com/Effect-TS/effect-smol/archive/refs/tags/effect@4.0.0-beta.27.tar.gz | tar -xz -C refs/effect4 --strip-components=1
scripts.refs:effect3-workshop: rm -rf refs/effect3-workshop && mkdir -p refs/effect3-workshop && git clone --depth 1 --branch main https://github.com/Effect-TS/effect-days-2025-workshop.git refs/effect3-workshop
scripts.refs:cerr: rm -rf refs/cerr && mkdir -p refs/cerr && curl -L https://github.com/mw10013/cloudflare-effect-react-router/archive/refs/heads/main.tar.gz | tar -xz -C refs/cerr --strip-components=1
scripts.clone:links: [ ! -e refs ] && ln -s ../tanstack-cloudflare-agent/refs refs; [ ! -e todo.md ] && ln -s ../tanstack-cloudflare-agent/todo.md todo.md
